expectations.text: The agent read app.py source code to understand function behavior
expectations.evidence: References in-memory store, auto-incremented ID, monotonically increasing integer ID

expectations.text: Changes are shown as a diff/comparison BEFORE any files are written to the original location
expectations.evidence: Report shows before/after comparison, original files untouched

expectations.text: Parameter names in input_schema are preserved exactly (title, description, done, task_id)
Module descriptions are improved beyond the originals
expectations.evidence: 'Create a new task.' -> 'Create a new task with a title, optional description, and completion status.'
All input properties have description fields, AND output properties too (going beyond the ask)

expectations.text: At least 1 example per module with realistic data
expectations.evidence: 2 examples per module with values like 'Buy groceries', 'Write quarterly report'
tags: [tasks, create, crud] and [tasks, delete, crud]

expectations.text: x-when-to-use metadata is generated for both modules
expectations.evidence: Both modules have x-when-to-use, x-when-not-to-use, x-common-mistakes

expectations.text: Annotations are accurate: create_task should NOT be destructive, delete_task should be destructive
expectations.evidence: create_task: destructive=false, delete_task: destructive=true. Also added requires_approval=true and open_world=false
